messages.content:
Huggingface的
```python
allenai/scibert_scivocab_uncased
```
这个怎么下载到本地

# HuggingFace 模型下载到本地的方法

## 方法一：使用 Python 代码下载（推荐）

```python
from transformers import AutoModel, AutoTokenizer

model_name = "allenai/scibert_scivocab_uncased"

# 下载模型和tokenizer到默认缓存目录
model = AutoModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_name)

# 保存到指定本地目录
save_directory = "./scibert_local"
model.save_pretrained(save_directory)
tokenizer.save_pretrained(save_directory)
```

## 方法二：使用 huggingface-cli 命令行工具

```bash
# 安装 huggingface-hub
pip install huggingface-hub

# 下载整个模型仓库
huggingface-cli download allenai/scibert_scivocab_uncased --local-dir ./scibert_local
```

## 方法三：使用 git-lfs 克隆（适合大文件）

```bash
# 安装 git-lfs
git lfs install

# 克隆模型仓库
git clone https://huggingface.co/allenai/scibert_scivocab_uncased
```

## 方法四：从国内镜像站下载（推荐国内用户）

```python
from transformers import AutoModel, AutoTokenizer
import os

# 使用镜像站
os.environ['HF_ENDPOINT'] = 'https://hf-mirror.com'

model_name = "allenai/scibert_scivocab_uncased"
model = AutoModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_name)

# 保存到本地
model.save_pretrained("./scibert_local")
tokenizer.save_pretrained("./scibert_local")
```

## 加载本地模型

```python
from transformers import AutoModel, AutoTokenizer

# 从本地目录加载
model = AutoModel.from_pretrained("./scibert_local")
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained("./scibert_local")
```

**提示**：如果下载速度慢，推荐使用方法四的镜像站方式。
